summary: The following standard formalizes the Series Accounting Method for [ERC-7540](./eip-7540.md) and [ERC-4626](./eip-4626.md) type vaults, enabling them to collect performance fees on yields without introducing the free-rider problem. It defines the necessary architectural specification for implementing Series Accounting by requiring an independent Series to track each batch of claimed deposit requests within the vault with its unique `totalAssets`, `totalShares`, `sharesOf` and `highwaterMark` values.
title: Series Accounting for Incentivized Vaults
